title: Resolve domain behavior before API and UI details
subject: Stress-test adding scheduled report delivery across the API, worker, database, and admin UI.

files.content:
# Reports

Admins generate reports synchronously today. The API, worker, and browser UI live in this repository. Email delivery already exists in the worker.
Only organization admins may generate reports. Existing generated reports expire after 30 days.

repositoryFacts.statement: API, worker, UI, and an existing email-delivery path are present.
forbiddenQuestionSignals: do you already have email delivery

repositoryFacts.statement: Only organization admins may generate reports.

unresolvedDecisions.prompt: What schedule semantics and timezone own a report?
What happens when a scheduled run is missed?
Which recipients may receive a scheduled report?
Which scheduling controls should the admin UI expose?

scriptedUserReplies.text: Each schedule uses an IANA timezone and supports daily or weekly recurrence.
Run once immediately after recovery if the scheduled time was missed by less than six hours; otherwise skip it.
Recipients must be verified members of the same organization.
